Better Insights. Faster.
Heap has joined forces with Contentsquare 🎉 Together, we automatically capture every user interaction so you always have the data you need to increase conversions, retention, and customer delight.
Free Trial
Contact Sales
Carousel with 1 tiles shown at a time. Tab to see all tiles
Discover Product Analytics Sense Chat
Sense Chat makes it easy for anyone to get started with analytics, no matter their experience. Skip the learning curve and lengthy onboarding—and go straight to insights.
Sense AI
NEW! Product Analytics Buyer's Guide
Product Analytics lets you track all the user behavior you know — and see all the user behavior you don’t. Find out how product analytics can help your business.
GET THE GUIDE
Heap is used by over 10,000 companies to understand customers’ end-to-end journeys, improve conversion and activation, increase retention, and deliver a great user experience.
20%
Increased Adoption
Heap.io
30%
Increased Conversions
Huel Logo
$1M+
Increased Personal Loan Volume
Lending Club logo
$225k
Saved Per Month
Heap.io
Heap + Contentsquare now give you better insights, faster
Learn more about the Experience Intelligence Platform
Complete data, automatically
A single snippet automatically captures the entire digital experience of every user on every platform — no engineering needed.

You get the most complete dataset on the market, governed and organized for maximum usage.
See how Heap captures all of your data
Spot hidden opportunities
Our advanced data science capabilities alert you to key moments of friction and opportunity in your digital experience—even on user behaviors you haven’t been following.

It’s an industry-first way to uncover the hidden gems that lead to the biggest business results.
Learn about Heap Illuminate
See problems in action
Get full context on every user action with integrated session replay. Heap directs you to the exact point in a session that you care about, saving you time and effort.

Fully understand why users do what they do. Instantly see what the fix is.
Learn about Heap's Session Replay
Down the Funnel
A new thought leadership hub. For all digital experience builders.
ebook and whitepaper
Humans lead, AI assists: how product teams embrace generative AI at work
Learn the latest generative AI trends in product development and best practices for implementing AI within your own team.
article
Heap x Contentsquare: Meet the Future of Experience Analytics
article
Top SaaS growth metrics for improving retention
Nailing activation and adoption might just be your secret sauce for success.
Visit Down the Funnel
See what makes Heap + Contentsquare so powerful
Speed to Insight = Speed to Success
Heap is the only solution that shows you every action by every user on your product or site, then provides direction on the improvements that will most impact your business.
Integrations across the stack
Over 100 integrations ensure you can deliver the right information to the right customers at the right moment in their journey.
Learn more about our integrations
Direction on key investments
Heap’s data science tools show you the alternate paths users take, the amount of effort it takes users to get through any flow, and the events that most correlate with conversion and retention. Automatically.
There is no other solution on the market that gives this insight on what to fix and how.
Learn more about Heap Illuminate
A single platform for data-driven decisions
Other solutions give you quantitative
or
qualitative tools. Heap integrates the two, giving you complete visibility into everything your users do.
It’s a new paradigm for data-driven decision-making.
Learn how Heap bridges the gap
Top-Ranked Everywhere
Our customers trust Heap for digital insights

Privacy Policy
Status
Trust
We and our third-party partners use cookies.
Before you have given your consent, only required cookies will be deployed. Click "Settings" to select whether and to what extent you consent to the use of cookies on our website. To learn more about the cookies we use, visit our Cookie Policy.
By clicking on the “Accept” button you consent to the use of all our cookies. By closing this box you refuse the use of all our cookies.
Cookie Policy
Cookies Settings
Continue Without Cookies
Accept All Cookies
Opt-Out Request Honored
Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Cookies Details‎
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Cookies Details‎
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Cookies Details‎
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Cookies Details‎

Add-Ons
Supercharge your product analytics with specialised add-ons that deliver deeper context on user journeys, data management, and more. Explore the tiles below and reach out to our team to learn more on how they can take your insights to the next level.
Contact Us
Experience Analytics
Go beyond the data. Instantly see user flows in context (Session Replay), diagnose errors at the source (Error Analysis), and visualize on-page engagement (Heatmaps) — Now deliver true memorable experiences.
Add-on for Pro and Premier
Heap Connect
Sync Heap data to your Data Warehouse — automatically and retroactively.
Add-on for Pro, included with Premier
Heap Activate
Integrate Heap data with customer engagement tools for personalized communication via email, in-app guides, and more.
Add-on for Pro, included with Premier
Projects
Manage separate analytics environments for multiple apps and websites.
2 environments included with Pro (with option to add more), unlimited with Premier
Data History
Extend your analysis capabilities out to 3 years. Unlock seasonal insights and compare year on year product updates.
Add-on for Pro and Premier
Professional Services
Access top-priority support and services for your team.
Included with Growth and Pro - Premium package with Premier
Learn More
Frequently Asked Questions
What is a session?
A
session
is a period of activity from a single user on your app or

Before you have given your consent, only required cookies will be deployed. Click "Settings" to select whether and to what extent you consent to the use of cookies on our website. To learn more about the cookies we use, visit our Cookie Policy.
By clicking on the “Accept” button you consent to the use of all our cookies. By closing this box you refuse the use of all our cookies.
Cookie Policy
Cookies Settings
Continue Without Cookies
Accept All Cookies
Opt-Out Request Honored
Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Cookies Details‎
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Cookies Details‎
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Cookies Details‎
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Cookies Details‎

docs.text:
Heap Help Center | Documentation & Support
Home
Developers
API
Releases
Community
University
Status
Developers
API
Releases
Community
University
Status
Heap Platform
Welcome to the Heap Help Center
Whether you’re new to digital insights or already have experience using data to drive your decisions, we have a wealth of product information, resource guides, and training courses designed just for you.
«
‹
1
›
»
most relevant results
«
‹
1
›
»
developer center results
more results
View More
Getting Started
New to Heap? These Getting Started resources are the perfect place to start.
Read More
Session Replay
Seeing is believing. See why users do what they do with session replay.
Read More
Data Management
Keep your data organized and take advantage of our entire analysis toolset with our data capture and management tools.
Read More
Data Types
For everything you need to know about data types in Heap, including events, segments, properties, and snapshots.
Read More
Charts
Chart your path to valuable insights in Heap with these handy overview guides and FAQs.
Read More
Chart Examples
Questions, meet insight. Turn your questions into actionable insights with our chart examples and FAQs.
Read More
Dashboard Templates
Ready for next-level analysis? Dig in with our templated dashboards tailored to your role or industry.
Read More
Analysis Guides
Dive deeper into your data with these how-to guides for all kinds of analysis, tailored to your role or industry.
Read More
Administration
Govern data and security, and organize your team with ease using these admin resources.
Read More
Integrations
Optimize your business insights by integrating Heap with your entire tech stack.
Read More
Heap Connect
Join Heap data with your warehouse or data lake for deeper business reporting, in-depth analysis, and customer modeling.
Read More
Data Privacy
Compliance and protection has never been easier using Heap’s security features. Learn more here.
Read More
Sense AI
Leveraging the latest in Al technology, Sense AI guides you through your analysis needs to reach insights faster.
Read More
Turning data into actionable insights has never been easier with Heap University. Access our in-depth collection of Heap University courses to get up and running — quickly and confidently — with Heap.
Learn More

Partners
Legal
Security
Terms
About
Careers

Get Support

analysis.name: Heap
analysis.value_proposition: Automatically captures every user interaction on your product/site to surface friction and opportunities that increase conversion, retention, and customer delight.
analysis.ideal_customer: Product, marketing, and data teams at SaaS, retail/eComm, healthcare, and financial services companies who need complete behavioral data without engineering effort

features.name: autocapture
features.description: Single snippet automatically captures the entire digital experience of every user on every platform without engineering effort
features.evidence_quote: A single snippet automatically captures the entire digital experience of every user on every platform

features.name: journeys
features.description: Visual maps of all user flows through the product
features.evidence_quote: Journeys — Visual maps of all user flows

features.name: sense ai
features.description: AI-powered analytics assistant that makes analytics accessible to anyone regardless of experience
features.evidence_quote: Sense Contentsquare's AI: AI Powered Assistant

features.name: sense chat
features.description: Conversational AI interface for getting started with analytics without a learning curve
features.evidence_quote: Sense Chat makes it easy for anyone to get started with analytics

features.name: ai summaries
features.description: AI-generated summaries of analytics data

features.name: ai follow-ups
features.description: AI-generated follow-up questions/suggestions on analytics

features.name: web analytics
features.description: Integrated web metrics tracking
features.evidence_quote: Web Analytics — Integrate key web metrics

features.name: session replay
features.description: Complete context on every user action with integrated session replay directed to the exact point in a session
features.evidence_quote: Session Replay — Complete context with a single click

features.name: heatmaps
features.description: Visualize user behavior instantly with heatmap overlays

features.name: heap illuminate
features.description: Data science capability that pinpoints unknown friction and surfaces hidden opportunities in user behavior
features.evidence_quote: Heap Illuminate — Data science that pinpoints unknown friction

features.name: segments
features.description: User cohorts for actionable insights
features.evidence_quote: Segments — User cohorts for actionable insights

features.name: dashboards
features.description: Shareable dashboards for critical metrics
features.evidence_quote: Dashboards — Share insights on critical metrics

features.name: charts
features.description: Analyze everything about your users with configurable charts

features.name: funnels
features.description: Funnel analysis for conversion optimization

features.name: retention analysis
features.description: Retention analytics chart type

features.name: influence analysis
features.description: Analyze which events influence conversion and retention

features.name: engagement matrix
features.description: Visual matrix showing feature engagement patterns

features.name: account-based analytics
features.description: B2B account-level analytics view

features.name: error analysis
features.description: Identify and analyze errors in user experience

features.name: playbooks
features.description: Plug-and-play templates and analyses

features.name: dashboard templates
features.description: Pre-built templated dashboards tailored by role or industry
features.evidence_quote: Dashboard Templates — Ready for next-level analysis

features.name: mobile analytics
features.description: Track and analyze users across mobile devices
features.evidence_quote: Mobile — Track and analyze your users across devices

features.name: enrichment
features.description: Add context to captured data from external sources

features.name: integrations
features.description: Bi-directional connections to over 100 tools across the stack
features.evidence_quote: Over 100 integrations ensure you can deliver the right information

features.name: data governance
features.description: Keep data clean and trusted with governance tools
features.evidence_quote: Governance — Keep data clean and trusted

features.name: heap connect
features.description: Send Heap data directly to your data warehouse or data lake

features.name: behavioral targeting
features.description: Target users based on behavioral data

features.name: report alerts
features.description: Alerts on report/metric changes

features.name: csv export
features.description: Export analytics data to CSV

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on authentication

features.name: advanced user permissions
features.description: Granular role/permission controls for large teams

features.name: region-specific storage
features.description: Data residency options in specific regions

features.name: unlimited projects
features.description: Unlimited number of projects/workspaces

features.name: unlimited users and reports
features.description: No caps on users or reports

features.name: chart customization
features.description: Customization options for charts beyond defaults

features.name: dedicated csm
features.description: Dedicated customer success manager for enterprise accounts

features.name: guides integration
features.description: Integration with in-product guides tools

features.name: data history 6 months
features.description: 6 months data history retention on Free tier

features.name: data history 12 months
features.description: 12 months data history retention on Growth tier

features.name: api access
features.description: Developer APIs for programmatic access

features.name: security and compliance
features.description: Security and privacy compliance features
features.evidence_quote: Security & Privacy — Security and compliance made simple

features.name: cro analyzer
features.description: Conversion rate optimization analysis tool

features.name: benchmark reports
features.description: Industry benchmark data (2026 Benchmark Report)
features.evidence_quote: Unlock 2026 Benchmark data → Get end-to-end journey insights

differentiators: Automatic event capture with a single snippet — no engineering needed
Heap Illuminate data science surfaces unknown friction automatically
Integrated quantitative + qualitative (analytics + session replay) in one platform
Merged with Contentsquare for combined product analytics + digital experience analytics

recent_ships.what: Heap + Contentsquare merger integrated Experience Intelligence Platform
recent_ships.source: Heap has joined forces with Contentsquare

recent_ships.what: Sense Chat — conversational AI analytics interface
recent_ships.source: Sense Chat makes it easy for anyone to get started with analytics

praised: Automatic event capture eliminates engineering dependency for tracking
Complete dataset — captures behaviors teams didn't know to track upfront
Heap Illuminate surfaces friction points teams weren't looking for

free_tier.limits: Up to 10k monthly sessions; 6 months data history

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Core charts, unlimited enrichment sources, Guides integrations, 6mo history, SSO, 10k monthly sessions

tiers.name: Growth
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Free + Sense AI, unlimited users/reports, chart customization, CSV exports, 12mo history, email support

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Growth + account analytics, engagement matrix, report alerts, session replay add-on, standard support

tiers.name: Premier
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Pro + warehouse integration, behavioral targeting, unlimited projects, advanced permissions, dedicated CSM, regional storage

pricing.notes: Custom session-based pricing for Pro and Premier tiers — no public per-seat or flat prices disclosed. Free tier capped at 10k monthly sessions. Session Replay and Heatmaps are paid add-ons even on Pro/Premier.

recent_hn.title: Fli -a tiny (18KB) easy to read file listing tool. Rust no_std and Libc
From garbage can to compost heap
Heap buffer overflow in WolfSSL SNI and ECH code
Show HN: Kintsugi – a local-first safety net for AI agents and humans
